zh-tw.title: 旅遊語錄
zh-tw.description: 從出國前的失眠、機場凌晨的低聲咒罵，到回家以後第一碗泡麵——精選旅行金句、廢話文學、國旅心情語錄，給每一個還在背包裡找護照的你

en.title: Travel Quotes
en.description: Wanderlust lines, airport sighs, and luggage truths — short travel quotes for the people who packed too much, slept too little, and somehow loved every minute of it

items.sourceNote: 經典 wanderlust register，重新組合改寫

zh-tw.content:
旅行不是逃離生活，
是給生活一個機會，
讓你重新愛上它。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合放在旅遊照 IG caption、年末回顧文、辭職告別信開頭——比「世界這麼大我想去看看」 更不口號、更有溫度
variations: 旅行不是逃避，是讓你回來時，重新願意打開家門那一刻的儀式。

en.content:
Travel isn't running away from your life.
It's giving your life a reason to want you back.
en.editorNote: Works as an Instagram caption, a year-end reflection post, or a goodbye line in a goodbye-for-now letter to friends
variations: Travel isn't an escape — it's the long way back to the version of yourself you forgot you liked.

items.sourceNote: 經典 luggage / emotional baggage 雙關，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我去旅行不是要放下行李，
是要把行李帶到比較有海景的地方繼續放著。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在朋友問「你旅遊都在幹嘛」時回的廢話金句，比「轉換心情」之類的官腔好笑很多
variations: 我以為旅行會讓我放下情緒包袱，後來發現只是搬到別的飯店繼續打開來檢查。

en.content:
I didn't go on this trip to leave my baggage behind.
I just wanted to unpack it somewhere with a better view.
en.editorNote: A self-aware caption for the kind of trip that's clearly therapy-with-a-passport — works on solo travel posts, divorce trips, or any 'main character era' moment
variations: Therapy is expensive. Plane tickets are expensive. But at least the plane ticket comes with a window seat.

items.sourceNote: 2026 國旅補助 timely register，原創 frame

zh-tw.content:
國旅補助讓我搞清楚一件事：
我不是不想出門，
我是不想用原價出門。
zh-tw.editorNote: 2026 國旅補助 4–6月主場期最在地的廢文 register；適合 LINE 群組丟給準備搶券的朋友、IG 自嘲文、Threads 短發
variations: 今年的旅行不是衝動，是補助到期前的責任感。
我不是節儉，我是用 1200 塊住宿券的方式宣示我還活著。

en.content:
I'm not cheap.
I just refuse to travel without a discount code, a coupon, and three layers of strategic timing.
en.editorNote: Universal voice for budget travelers — works on Reddit r/travel posts, deal-hunting blog intros, and any caption where the receipts are part of the joke
variations: I don't choose destinations. The flight deals choose me.

items.sourceNote: 廢話文學 register × travel，原創

zh-tw.content:
在飛機上，
每飛一分鐘，
就離家更遠一分鐘。
zh-tw.editorNote: 標準廢話文學 frame——適合在朋友傳機場照分享時回一句，或自己出國登機前發一則 IG 限動，自帶笑點
variations: 搭飛機最大的好處，是讓你抵達一個你還沒抵達的地方。

en.content:
Every minute on a plane
is one minute closer to where you're going,
and one minute further from where you were.

Wild.
en.editorNote: Deadpan absurdist humor — pairs well with a window-seat photo or a caption on any flight you'd rather not be taking
variations: The thing about airplanes is that they take you somewhere. That's actually their whole deal.

items.sourceNote: I followed my heart frame，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我聽從我的內心，
結果它把我帶到了桃園機場第二航廈，
出境大廳，凌晨四點。
zh-tw.editorNote: 凌晨機場 specific moment 是 LINE / Threads / IG 限動最有畫面感的 frame——適合搭配機場照、登機證、或失眠紅眼班機自拍
variations: 我跟著直覺走，直覺把我帶到行李超重 800 塊台幣的櫃台。

en.content:
I followed my heart
and somehow ended up at gate 47
at 4:30 in the morning,
eating the worst sandwich of my life.
en.editorNote: Captions for that 4 AM airport energy — pair with a tired-but-happy selfie or a photo of a depressing airport breakfast
variations: I followed my heart. It led to the airport. My heart is just a flight deal alert.

items.sourceNote: richer-by-spending 經典 frame，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
錢包變薄的速度，
剛好等於你回憶變厚的速度。

這就是旅行最公平的匯率。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合放年末旅行總結文、消費後合理化貼文、跟長輩解釋為什麼又出國的金句——溫柔但夠堅定
variations: 旅行是唯一一種你花完錢，還會覺得自己更富有的消費。

en.content:
The money leaves your account.
The memory takes its place.

That's the exchange rate of every good trip.
en.editorNote: Works as a comeback for anyone who calls travel 'wasteful' — gentle but firm. Good for travel blog intros and reflective IG captions
variations: Money runs out. Memories don't. Spend accordingly.

items.sourceNote: solo travel register，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
一個人的旅行最孤獨的不是路上，
是回來以後
發現沒有人聽得懂
你為了一道湯走了三條街的興奮。
zh-tw.editorNote: 獨旅後 IG 長 caption / Threads 抒發 / 部落格開頭都好用——獨旅族最痛的點不是寂寞而是回來無人共享，這句一刀切中
variations: 一個人的旅行最大的禮物，是學會跟自己約會、跟自己吵架、跟自己和解，全部一個下午搞定。

en.content:
Solo travel isn't lonely on the road.
It's lonely when you come home
and nobody else gets why
the bowl of soup mattered.
en.editorNote: Solo travel reflection caption — captures the post-trip ache that solo travelers know but rarely articulate
variations: Solo travel taught me that the loneliest part isn't the trip. It's explaining the trip to people who weren't there.

items.sourceNote: Dcard 出國行李清單 register，原創廢文

zh-tw.content:
出國前一晚的失眠，
不是焦慮，
是身體比你早一步
進入下一個時區。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合凌晨打包到一半的 IG 限動、紅眼班機自拍、Threads 短發——把人人都有的「出發前睡不著」 重新詮釋成浪漫的事
variations: 凌晨三點還在數行李件數的我，已經提前抵達目的地的失眠，只剩身體沒跟上。

en.content:
The night before a trip
you don't sleep
because your body has already left.
It's just waiting for you to catch up.
en.editorNote: Reframes pre-trip insomnia as something poetic instead of stressful — works for a 3 AM packing photo or a red-eye flight caption
variations: I haven't slept in 22 hours and I haven't even left my apartment. This is what excitement looks like at 34.

items.sourceNote: 出國行李清單 anxiety register，原創

zh-tw.content:
我帶的不是行李，
是「萬一」的清單：
萬一冷、萬一熱、萬一下雨、
萬一我的人生在飯店突然需要一條牙線。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合行李炸開的 IG 照、跟朋友互嘲打包習慣、出國前 Threads 自嘲——精準描述 Dcard 行李清單派 vs 隨興派的痛
variations: 我整理行李不是在打包，是在預演 28 種可能的我。

en.content:
I'm not packing a suitcase.
I'm packing every version of myself
that might possibly need to exist
for the next ten days.
en.editorNote: For the chronic over-packer — captures the truth that packing anxiety is really identity anxiety in a smaller container
variations: I packed for the weather, the mood, the meeting I won't have, and the version of me who finally journals every morning.

items.sourceNote: 「找回自己」 register，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
旅行不是去看世界，
是去看世界裡，
那個你本來就該長成的樣子。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合 30 歲生日旅行文、辭職環島、Gap Year 心得開頭——比「找自己」 更具體、不矯情
variations: 我不是出門找風景，我是去確認那個我喜歡過的自己還在不在。

en.content:
You don't travel to see the world.
You travel to find the version of yourself
the world has been waiting for.
en.editorNote: Birthday trip captions, gap year intros, post-resignation soul-search posts — sincere without being saccharine
variations: I'm not chasing the view. I'm chasing the version of me who only shows up at altitude.

items.sourceNote: 「I haven't been everywhere」 經典 frame，改寫

zh-tw.content:
我還沒去過所有地方，
但是我有清單，
清單比我還長壽。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合放護照本內頁、行李吊牌、IG bio——自帶幽默又勵志，比「夢想清單」 更輕快
variations: 我的待辦清單越長，代表我活得越認真。

en.content:
I haven't been everywhere yet.
But I have the list.
The list will outlive me, honestly.
en.editorNote: Bio-line energy. Works on a passport cover, a luggage tag, or as the closing line of a 'places I want to visit' post
variations: I haven't been everywhere. But I'm working on it. Slowly. Expensively. Joyfully.

items.sourceNote: airplane / wing 經典雙關，改寫

zh-tw.content:
問：搭飛機的時候我都在幹嘛？

答：在祈禱。
還有，看別人也在祈禱。
zh-tw.editorNote: 怕飛族專屬廢文——適合搭配登機自拍、機艙窗戶照，告訴朋友「我這趟回不來請記得餵我家的貓」 的幽默版本
variations: 搭飛機最高深的禪修：把命交給駕駛艙、把胃交給亂流、把希望交給空姐推餐車。

en.content:
What do I do on planes?

I pray.
And I watch other people pray.

It's a community.
en.editorNote: For nervous flyers — pairs with a window selfie or a 'if I don't come back, feed my cat' joke caption
variations: Flying is just trusting strangers in really specific outfits with your entire life. We're all very brave.

items.sourceNote: Taiwan Pass / 國旅 2026 timely register，原創

zh-tw.content:
台灣很小，
但小到剛好可以
讓你週五下班、
週日晚上回到自己床上，
中間還塞得進一座海。
zh-tw.editorNote: 2026 Taiwan Pass / 國旅補助 主場期最 timely 的在地旅行金句——適合花蓮、台東、墾丁、宜蘭出遊文，IG / Threads / LINE 三平台通用
variations: 在台灣，最遠的距離不是雙北到屏東，是星期五的你到星期一的你。

en.content:
Taiwan is small enough
to leave on Friday after work,
be at the ocean by sunset,
and still sleep in your own bed Sunday night.

That's not small. That's perfect.
en.editorNote: For international readers / overseas Taiwanese — captures why weekend trips in Taiwan hit different. Use on travel blog posts about Taiwan or expat-life captions
variations: Taiwan: the only country small enough to fit a beach, a mountain, and a regret in a single weekend.

items.sourceNote: jet lag IG caption register，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
時差不是病，
是你的身體還愛著前一個城市，
捨不得跟你回來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合回國第一天頂著黑眼圈上班的 IG 限動、Threads 自嘲，或回國後第三天還在凌晨四點清醒滑手機的 caption——把時差講得很浪漫
variations: 我不是時差，我是身體比靈魂晚三天到家。

en.content:
Jet lag isn't an illness.
It's your body still in love with the last city,
refusing to come home with you.
en.editorNote: Captions for the post-trip haze — works on the under-eye-circles selfie, the 4 AM scroll, or the first-day-back-at-work zombie photo
variations: I don't have jet lag. My body is just three days behind my soul, and we're both fine with it.

items.sourceNote: Google Maps / 迷路 register，原創

zh-tw.content:
我沒有迷路，
我只是讓 Google Maps 帶我認識
它私心想推薦的小巷。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在巷弄迷路時拍的廢照搭配的 caption，或事後跟朋友解釋為什麼遲到一小時的金句——把焦慮變成風格
variations: 迷路不是錯誤，是 Google Maps 的隱藏行程。

en.content:
I'm not lost.
I'm just letting Google Maps show me
the alleys it personally recommends.
en.editorNote: Captions for the inevitable wrong-turn photos — reframes getting lost as a feature, not a bug. Pairs with cobblestone streets, dead-end alleys, or that one time you walked 40 minutes the wrong way
variations: Getting lost isn't a mistake. It's the unsponsored part of the trip.

items.sourceNote: out of office / vacation register，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
我的自動回覆寫著「休假中」，
但其實我是在練習一個更難的技能：
不打開公司信箱。
zh-tw.editorNote: 辦公室人最有共鳴的休假廢文——適合年假出國的 IG caption、Threads 短發、跟同事炫耀休假的 LINE 訊息
variations: 我不是在度假，我是在訓練自己對未讀訊息冷感。

en.content:
My out-of-office reply says I'm on vacation,
but what I'm really doing
is practicing the much harder skill
of not opening Slack.
en.editorNote: For the burned-out office traveler — captures the real challenge of vacation in 2026. Works on resort photos, beach selfies, or any 'I swear I'm relaxing' moment
variations: Vacation is just learning, slowly, painfully, that the world keeps spinning without your reply-all.

items.sourceNote: 回家 / homecoming register，原創

zh-tw.content:
旅行最棒的部分是出發，
第二棒的部分是抵達，
但最被低估的，
是打開家門那一刻
聞到的那股熟悉的味道。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合旅行回國後第一篇 IG 文、Threads 短發、年末回顧——把「回家」 寫得比目的地還動人
variations: 走過那麼多地方，最後發現家裡的味道才是這趟旅行最捨不得忘的東西。

en.content:
The best part of travel is leaving.
The second best is arriving.
The most underrated part
is opening your front door
and smelling your own life again.
en.editorNote: For the post-trip homecoming post — captures the quiet joy of returning that nobody puts on a moodboard. Works on 'unpacking' photos, first-coffee-back-home shots, or year-end travel reflections
variations: After everywhere, the best smell in the world turned out to be the inside of my own apartment.

items.sourceNote: hotel check-in / suite life register，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
飯店 check-in 的那一刻，
我才終於明白
所謂的 reset，
是一條乾淨的浴巾、
一張別人鋪好的床、
還有不用我擦的浴室鏡子。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合飯店窗景照、走廊自拍、puffy 床鋪平拍——把「住飯店」這件事的療癒感說到位，比「逃離日常」更具體
variations: 我不是在度假，我是在租用一個沒有家事責任的人生。
飯店房卡是地表上最便宜的「重新做人」工具。

en.content:
The moment you check into a hotel,
you understand:
a 'reset' is just a clean towel,
a bed someone else made,
and a bathroom mirror you didn't have to wipe.
en.editorNote: For the hotel-room flat lay, the floor-to-ceiling-window selfie, or the freshly-made-bed shot. Captures why hotels feel like therapy
variations: I'm not on vacation. I'm renting a version of my life where I don't do laundry.
A hotel keycard is the cheapest reset button on earth.

items.sourceNote: 紀念品 / souvenir register，原創

zh-tw.content:
我帶回來的那塊冰箱磁鐵，
貴得不合理，
醜得有特色，
但它每天提醒我：
那一週我活得比現在快樂一點。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合廚房冰箱特寫、紀念品開箱、回國整理戰利品的 IG 限動——把「買沒用的東西」 升格為情感投資
variations: 紀念品從來不是給別人看的，是給未來那個忘記怎麼快樂的自己留的線索。

en.content:
The fridge magnet I brought back
is overpriced,
slightly ugly,
and the only thing reminding me
that I was, briefly, a happier person.
en.editorNote: For the cluttered-fridge close-up or the souvenir haul photo — turns the cheap kitsch you regret buying into something quietly meaningful
variations: Souvenirs aren't for other people. They're notes you leave for the future version of you who forgot how to be happy.

items.sourceNote: food tourism / 美食旅行 register，原創

zh-tw.content:
我不是去旅行，
我是去用我的胃
親自驗證
別人 Google Maps 上四點七顆星
是不是真的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 美食控旅行專屬 caption——適合排隊兩小時的店門口照、剛上桌的食物特寫、Threads 食記開頭，比「為食而活」更有畫面感
variations: 我整趟行程沒看景點，只看餐廳的營業時間。
別人收集明信片，我收集胃食道逆流的回憶。

en.content:
I don't travel.
I personally verify, with my own stomach,
whether someone's 4.7-star review
on Google Maps
is telling the truth.
en.editorNote: For the food-traveler — pairs with the steaming bowl close-up, the two-hour-line selfie, or the 'restaurants only' itinerary post
variations: Other people collect postcards. I collect the heartburn of three different countries.
My itinerary isn't a list of cities. It's a list of restaurant opening hours.

items.sourceNote: trip end / suitcase reopened register，原創

zh-tw.content:
回國一週了，
我的行李箱還沒拆完。

這不是懶，
是我還沒準備好
承認旅行已經結束。
zh-tw.editorNote: 回國一週後的 Threads 自嘲、IG 限動廢文金句——精準描述旅人最尷尬的拖延症，把懶惰浪漫化
variations: 行李箱沒拆完，是我給自己留的最後一張機票存根。

en.content:
It's been a week.
My suitcase is still half-unpacked.

That's not laziness.
I'm just not ready
to admit the trip is over.
en.editorNote: For the suitcase-still-on-the-floor photo — captures the universal traveler's procrastination as a tiny act of denial. Works on Threads, IG captions, blog post intros
variations: An unpacked suitcase is the last boarding pass you get to hold onto.

items.sourceNote: airport 6 AM burger / passport-in-hand register，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
機場是一個神奇的地方：
早上六點吃漢堡不會有人覺得奇怪，
你也可以一邊翻包包找護照，
一邊忘記護照正握在你手上。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合凌晨機場自拍、登機證平拍、Threads 出國前廢發——把機場那種「時空錯亂」的荒謬感寫進去，誰看了都點頭
variations: 機場唯一的時區規則是：你的胃跟你的焦慮，永遠比起飛時間早三小時。
機場是少數幾個你可以對著一杯三百塊的拿鐵流眼淚，還沒人問你為什麼的地方。

en.content:
An airport is a magical place
where a 6 AM burger is normal,
and you can rip your bag apart
looking for the passport
you're already holding.
en.editorNote: For the bleary-eyed boarding-gate selfie or the chaos-bag flat lay — captures airport energy in a way every traveler has lived through at least once
variations: Airports are the only place where crying into a $9 latte feels like a perfectly reasonable Tuesday.
At the airport, your stomach and your anxiety are always three hours ahead of the actual flight.

items.sourceNote: lost luggage / surprise minimalist register，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
行李寄丟那一刻，
航空公司沒告訴我，
但他們其實送了我一份大禮：
為期七天的強制極簡生活體驗。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合行李轉盤前的尷尬自拍、機場詢問櫃台前的 Threads 廢發、回國後跟朋友抱怨用——把災難轉成段子，比直接哭哭好看一百倍
variations: 我不是被迫穿同一件衣服七天，我是在執行一個無預警的時尚挑戰。
行李寄丟最大的收穫，是發現我其實只需要三件 T 恤就能活下去（雖然不情願）。

en.content:
When the airline lost my luggage,
they didn't say it out loud,
but they basically gifted me
a seven-day mandatory minimalism retreat.
en.editorNote: For the empty-baggage-carousel photo, the same-outfit-day-three selfie, or the post-trip complaint thread — turns a mini-disaster into a punchline
variations: I'm not wearing the same shirt three days in a row. I'm participating in an unscheduled capsule wardrobe experiment.
Lost luggage taught me I can survive on three t-shirts. Reluctantly. Resentfully. But yes.

items.sourceNote: 「travel expands your luggage」雙關 frame，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
他們說旅行會開拓你的視野。

以我個人的經驗，
它主要開拓的是我的行李箱、
我的信用卡額度、
還有我對自己決策能力的懷疑。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合戰利品開箱、信用卡帳單來的那天的 IG 限動、Threads 自嘲文——把旅行最常被講的「開拓視野」 翻轉成最現實的版本
variations: 旅行不會讓我變成更好的人，但會讓我變成行李箱更滿的人。
出國回來唯一變寬的不是視野，是我的腰圍跟手機相簿。

en.content:
They say travel broadens the mind.

In my experience
it mainly broadens my suitcase,
my credit card limit,
and my deep distrust of my own decisions.
en.editorNote: Pairs with souvenir hauls, statement-day IG stories, or the post-trip 'why did I buy this' thread — flips the wanderlust cliché into something honest
variations: Travel doesn't make me a better person. It just makes me a person with a much fuller suitcase.
The only thing that got broader on this trip was my waistband and my camera roll.

items.sourceNote: photo vs. reality / 預期 vs 真實 register，原創

zh-tw.content:
IG 上看起來：日落、海景、自由的靈魂。
實際上：腳被沙子磨破皮、頭髮黏成一團、
我只是在等老闆已讀我兩小時前的請假訊息。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合「IG 美照 vs 真實狀態」 對比文、Threads 廢發、回國後爆料文——把社群上的旅行濾鏡撕掉一層，自帶笑點跟真誠
variations: 美照背後通常有三十張失敗、一隻被偷吃薯條的海鷗、跟我快斷掉的耐心。
你以為我在感受人生，其實我在等飯店 Wi-Fi 重新連上。

en.content:
What it looks like on Instagram:
sunset, ocean, free spirit.

What it actually is:
sand in my shoes, hair glued to my face,
and me waiting for my boss
to read the leave request I sent two hours ago.
en.editorNote: For the photo-vs-reality dump, the candid follow-up to a glossy sunset shot, or the honest IG carousel — peels back the travel filter without being cynical
variations: Behind every dreamy beach photo is thirty failed shots, one fry-stealing seagull, and a slowly fraying patience.
You think I'm soaking in life. I'm actually just waiting for the hotel Wi-Fi to reconnect.

items.sourceNote: road trip / 開車旅行 register，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
公路旅行最浪漫的部分，
不是窗外的風景，
是車上那個願意陪你
聽同一首歌循環二十七次
還沒翻臉的人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合公路旅行 IG caption、副駕自拍、Threads 抒情短發——把「找風景」 轉成「找伴」，比一般景點打卡更有故事感
variations: 車程五小時，我們吵了三次架、和好兩次，剩下那一次留給回程慢慢消化。
公路旅行教我的事：油表跟感情一樣，都要在還剩三分之一的時候提前處理。

en.content:
The best part of a road trip
isn't the view out the window.
It's the person in the passenger seat
who lets you replay the same song
twenty-seven times
without filing for divorce.
en.editorNote: For the open-road photo, the dashboard-and-coffee shot, or the dusty-windshield selfie — reframes road trips as relationship stress-tests in the best way
variations: Five hours in the car. Three fights. Two apologies. One unresolved tension we're saving for the drive home.
Road trips taught me: gas tanks and feelings both need refilling before they hit empty.

items.sourceNote: overpacking 經典 register，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
我每次出國都告訴自己：
這次絕對輕便出門。

然後我打包了
五雙鞋、
三本沒時間看的書、
還有一個熨斗。

為什麼帶熨斗，
至今是個謎。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合行李炸開的平拍、出國前夜 IG 限動、Threads 自嘲——把每個人都犯過的「打包失控」 寫成輕喜劇
variations: 我說好的輕便旅行，最後變成把整個衣櫃搬到 23 公斤以內的競技。
行李箱裝得下我的不安全感，但裝不下我自己。

en.content:
Every trip I promise myself:
this time I'll pack light.

Then I bring
five pairs of shoes,
three books I won't open,
and an iron.

Why the iron.
Nobody knows.
en.editorNote: For the chaos-suitcase flat lay, the night-before-trip story, or the airport check-in queue selfie — the universal overpacker confession
variations: I said 'pack light.' I packed every insecurity I own and then some, neatly folded.
My suitcase has room for my anxiety, but not for me.

items.sourceNote: 兌幣 / 匯率 register，原創

zh-tw.content:
出國前換錢那一刻，
我才終於懂了
什麼叫做
「數字看起來很多，
花起來像在燒衛生紙」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合銀行 ATM 自拍、外幣信封照、剛回國盤點剩錢的 Threads 廢發——把匯率焦慮寫得很有畫面
variations: 換到一疊鈔票的瞬間我是富翁，付完第一頓飯我就變回打工仔。
我的旅費換完之後變成另一種語言，連數錯都很有國際感。

en.content:
Exchanging money before a trip
is the moment you finally understand
what 'numerically rich,
practically broke'
actually means.
en.editorNote: Works on the bank-counter selfie, the fan-of-foreign-bills photo, or the post-trip 'how did I spend it all' Threads post — captures the surreal math of currency exchange
variations: I felt rich for exactly four seconds — from the ATM to the first meal.
My travel budget gets translated into a new language at the exchange counter. Even miscounting it feels worldly.

items.sourceNote: travel companion / 旅伴 friction register，原創

zh-tw.content:
想知道一個人真正的個性，
別跟他聊夢想、
別跟他喝酒，
直接約他去自由行七天，
第三天早上的早餐桌上見真章。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合跟朋友的旅伴合照、Threads 旅行心得短發、IG 出遊回顧——把旅伴文化講得很到位，自帶笑點又真實
variations: 旅行最考驗的不是體力，是你能不能在第五天還願意跟同行的人講話。
好的旅伴比好的景點難找太多，找到了請記得珍惜，找不到請學會獨旅。

en.content:
You want to know someone's real personality?
Don't ask about their dreams.
Don't get drinks.
Go on a seven-day trip with them
and check in over breakfast on day three.
en.editorNote: For the travel-buddy duo shot, the awkward-restaurant-table photo, or the Threads post about surviving group travel — captures the universal truth that trips are friendship pressure tests
variations: Travel doesn't test your stamina. It tests whether you're still willing to talk to your friend on day five.
Good travel partners are rarer than good destinations. Find one, keep one. Otherwise, solo trip it is.
